arts.ttl: Christopher Nkunku transfer latest: Man United leading race for Chelsea striker - who else could he join?
arts.sum: Christopher Nkunku's Chelsea future remains uncertain as the deadline nears, with Manchester United leading the race for the striker amid interest from top European clubs.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano issues crucial update on Chelsea interest in Alejandro Garnacho
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has left Manchester United to join Aston Villa in a loan move and the Red Devils could lose another winger on deadline day. Alejandro Garnacho has been linked with a move to Premier League rivals Chelsea throughout the winter transfer window. arts.ttl: Alejandro Garnacho and 8 Chelsea transfers that can be completed for Enzo Maresca on deadline day
arts.sum: football.london understands Crystal Palace have made a move to sign Chilwell on loan from Chelsea prior to the transfer deadline . Carney Chukwuemeka is another player who ideally needs to depart Stamford Bridge prior to the transfer deadline due to a lack of football this season.

arts.ttl: Chelsea defender Disasi set for pre-deadline loan move
arts.sum: Axel Disasi is among the players expected to leave Chelsea on loan before tonight’s transfer deadline. Tottenham and Aston Villa are among clubs interested in the defender, who has made just six Premier League appearances this season. Disasi, 26, has slipped further down the pecking order of centre-backs following Trevoh Chalobah’s recent recall from a […] The post Chelsea defender Disasi set for pre-deadline loan move appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: How Graham Potter came back stronger from Chelsea 'washing machine'
arts.sum: Graham Potter is back at Chelsea tonight as West Ham's new head coach and his reflections on short and tricky time at Stamford Bridge have taught him to improve

Chelsea fans have been left amused at ‘mad’ thing about Axel Disasi’s potential move to Tottenham
Tyrique George can be Enzo Maresca's man amid Chelsea transfer problem
arts.sum: As reported by football.london last month, the Blues are scouring the transfer market for a left-sided winger with the future of Mykhailo Mudryk uncertain. With a move for Tel now very tricky, Chelsea could look to revisit the Garnacho situation with United reportedly open to selling the 20-year-old Argentine as they look to comply with the Premier League's Profitability and Sustainability Rules.

arts.ttl: Chelsea Transfer News: Blues agree shock €50m Carney Chukwuemeka deal - Fabrizio Romano
arts.sum: Chelsea and Borussia Dortmund have agreed a shock €50 million transfer for Carney Chukwuemeka, according to Fabrizio Romano. According to Fabrizio Romano, the Bundesliga side will loan Chukwuemeka until the end of the season with a purchase option worth more than his €48m release clause.
